emit.description: Whether the scout writes findings to the inbox. False = dry-run: it runs and logs but emits nothing.

enabled.description: Whether this scout runs on its schedule. Disabled scouts are skipped by the coordinator.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this Signal scout config.

run_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between runs (30–43200). Use 1440 for a daily schedule.

run_time_of_day.description: Optional project-local time for a daily (1440-minute) schedule, formatted as HH:MM:SS. The project timezone is used automatically. Set null to return to a rolling 24-hour interval.
